Documentation.long_help: Moves every point of the input vtkPolyData along an extrusion direction by a distance. By default directions are computed point normals (vtkPolyDataNormals). Optionally use any 3-component point vector array as direction (normalized per point). Distance is ExtrusionDistance times an optional per-point scalar multiplier array. Topology and data arrays are preserved (coordinates only change).
Documentation.short_help: Per-point extrusion along normals or a vector array; optional scalar distance multiplier.

DoubleVectorProperty.name: ExtrusionDistance
DoubleVectorProperty.label: Extrusion Distance
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: Base displacement length along the direction at each point. When a distance multiplier array is enabled, the actual length is ExtrusionDistance multiplied by that scalar per point.

IntVectorProperty.name: UseNormalsForDirection
IntVectorProperty.label: Use Normals For Direction
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: When on, directions come from vtkPolyDataNormals on the input mesh. Turn off to choose a point vector array (see Direction Array).

StringVectorProperty.name: DirectionArrayName
StringVectorProperty.label: Direction Array
StringVectorProperty.Documentation: 3-component point vector; used when "Use Normals For Direction" is off (required in that mode). Each tuple is normalized; extrusion distance is applied along that unit direction.

IntVectorProperty.name: UseDistanceMultiplierArray
IntVectorProperty.label: Use Distance Multiplier Array
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: When on, displacement length at each point is ExtrusionDistance times the selected scalar array.

StringVectorProperty.name: DistanceMultiplierArrayName
StringVectorProperty.label: Distance Multiplier Array
StringVectorProperty.Documentation: Per-point scalar multiplier for ExtrusionDistance (first component used if multi-component). Required when "Use Distance Multiplier Array" is on.

IntVectorProperty.name: FlipDirection
IntVectorProperty.label: Flip Direction
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: Extrude in the opposite direction (negate the unit direction before scaling).
